description: Static scan of SpectraCQ v1.0 Cypher queries for Neo4j-specific constructs that prevent direct SPARQL translation. Schema-level queries are those using only path/property patterns and SPARQL-equivalent aggregates translatable via the OWL TTL.
methodology_note: Conservative classification: queries using only graph patterns + standard aggregates (count, avg, collect, case) are counted as schema-level since SPARQL has equivalent constructs. Queries using apoc.*, variable-length paths >0 hops, shortestPath, or method-chain string ops are classified Neo4j-specific.
